name: agent-handoff
description: Install a compact repo-local handoff ledger for switching between Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and other coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Share compact repo state across coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Install a lightweight handoff convention with AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .agents/state.md, optional Claude/Cursor adapters, and a validator so agents can continue work after quota or tool switches.
defaultPrompt: Enable agent handoff in this repo.
